slots.name: booleanCellFalseIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the boolean cell to represent the false value.

slots.name: booleanCellTrueIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the boolean cell to represent the true value.

slots.name: bottomContainer
slots.description: Component rendered for the bottom container.

slots.name: cell
slots.description: Component rendered for each cell.

slots.name: columnFilteredIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the column header menu to show that a filter has been applied to the column.

slots.name: columnHeaderFilterIconButton
slots.description: Filter icon component rendered in each column header.

slots.name: columnHeaders
slots.description: Component responsible for rendering the column headers.

slots.name: columnHeaderSortIcon
slots.description: Sort icon component rendered in each column header.

slots.name: columnMenu
slots.description: Column menu component rendered by clicking on the 3 dots "kebab" icon in column headers.

slots.name: columnMenuClearIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed in column menu for clearing values

slots.name: columnMenuFilterIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed in column menu for filter

slots.name: columnMenuHideIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed in column menu for hiding column

slots.name: columnMenuIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the side of the column header title to display the filter input component.

slots.name: columnMenuManageColumnsIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed in column menu for showing all columns

slots.name: columnMenuSortAscendingIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed in column menu for ascending sort

slots.name: columnMenuSortDescendingIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed in column menu for descending sort

slots.name: columnMenuUnsortIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed in column menu for unsort

slots.name: columnReorderIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the column reorder button.

slots.name: columnResizeIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed in between two column headers that allows to resize the column header.

slots.name: columnSelectorIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the column menu selector tab.

slots.name: columnsManagement
slots.description: Component used inside Grid Columns panel to manage columns.

slots.name: columnSortedAscendingIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the side of the column header title when sorted in ascending order.

slots.name: columnSortedDescendingIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the side of the column header title when sorted in descending order.

slots.name: columnsPanel
slots.description: GridColumns panel component rendered when clicking the columns button.

slots.name: columnUnsortedIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the side of the column header title when unsorted.

slots.name: densityComfortableIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the "comfortable" density option in the toolbar.

slots.name: densityCompactIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the compact density option in the toolbar.

slots.name: densityStandardIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the standard density option in the toolbar.

slots.name: detailPanelCollapseIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the detail panel toggle column when expanded.

slots.name: detailPanelExpandIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the detail panel toggle column when collapsed.

slots.name: detailPanels
slots.description: Component responsible for rendering the detail panels.

slots.name: exportIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the open export button present in the toolbar by default.

slots.name: filterPanel
slots.description: Filter panel component rendered when clicking the filter button.

slots.name: filterPanelAddIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed for deleting the filter from filter panel.

slots.name: filterPanelDeleteIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed for deleting the filter from filter panel.

slots.name: filterPanelRemoveAllIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed for deleting all the active filters from filter panel.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Footer component rendered at the bottom of the grid viewport.

slots.name: footerRowCount
slots.description: Row count component rendered in the footer

slots.name: groupingCriteriaCollapseIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the grouping column when the children are expanded

slots.name: groupingCriteriaExpandIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the grouping column when the children are collapsed

slots.name: loadIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the input while processing.

slots.name: loadingOverlay
slots.description: Loading overlay component rendered when the grid is in a loading state.

slots.name: longTextCellCollapseIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the long text cell popup to collapse the content.

slots.name: longTextCellExpandIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the long text cell to expand the content.

slots.name: menuItemCheckIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed to indicate that a menu item is selected.

slots.name: moreActionsIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the `actions` column type to open the menu.

slots.name: noColumnsOverlay
slots.description: No columns overlay component rendered when the grid has no columns.

slots.name: noResultsOverlay
slots.description: No results overlay component rendered when the grid has no results after filtering.

slots.name: noRowsOverlay
slots.description: No rows overlay component rendered when the grid has no rows.

slots.name: openFilterButtonIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the open filter button present in the toolbar by default.

slots.name: pagination
slots.description: Pagination component rendered in the grid footer by default.

slots.name: panel
slots.description: Panel component wrapping the filters and columns panels.

slots.name: quickFilterClearIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the quick filter reset input.

slots.name: quickFilterIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the quick filter input.

slots.name: redoIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the redo button in the toolbar.

slots.name: row
slots.description: Component rendered for each row.

slots.name: rowCheckbox
slots.description: Component rendered for each row selection checkbox.

slots.name: rowReorderIcon
slots.description: Icon displayed on the `reorder` column type to reorder a row.

slots.name: skeletonCell
slots.description: Component rendered for each skeleton cell.

slots.name: toolbar
slots.description: Toolbar component rendered in the grid header.

slots.name: treeDataExpandIcon
